refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for each phase of the load→travel→dump cycle to meet the customer-defined target.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the overall cycle time KPI into sub-FRs for each phase allows targeted design parameters and clearer verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure p95 cycle time for load, travel, and dump phases separately under duty cycle and site conditions.
sub_frs: Minimize load phase cycle time to meet target
Minimize travel phase cycle time to meet target
Minimize dump phase cycle time to meet target

candidate_dps: Optimize hydraulic system response and control algorithms for load phase
Implement efficient path planning and vehicle dynamics control for travel phase
Enhance dumping mechanism speed and control for dump phase
selected_dp.selected_dp: Optimize hydraulic system response and control algorithms for load phase

potential_sources: Interdependence between load and travel phases due to vehicle state
Control algorithm parameters affecting multiple phases
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically separable by phase with manageable coupling via control parameters.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate cycle phase detection and timing measurement
Risk of control algorithm complexity impacting real-time performance
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit interface definitions between phase control DPs to reduce coupling.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and control systems responsible for hydraulic actuation and vehicle dynamics during load phase

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Send load phase status and cycle time metrics to NGHE Solution

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receive load phase commands from NGHE Solution or Teleoperation

module_containment_scores.notes: High-level coordination, less direct control of load phase specifics.
Primary containment of load phase control and actuation.
Supports manual override but not primary load phase control.
Monitors safety but does not control load phase.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Load phase cycle time optimization is best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize diffusion and maintain control integrity.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with Teleoperation commands causing control conflicts
Safety Services may require real-time intervention affecting load phase timing
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and priority rules between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes cycle time KPI into manageable sub-FRs; selected DP logically addresses load phase optimization.

diffusion_risks: Control logic diffusion between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
Potential safety intervention diffusion from Safety Services
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment for load phase DP; interfaces with Teleoperation and Safety Services are well identified.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and cycle time measurements is feasible at Vehicle module level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of load phase control DP to Vehicle IM with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface definitions between Vehicle and Teleoperation to avoid control conflicts.
Incorporate safety intervention timing constraints into load phase DP.

decision.justification: While the current level decomposition and assignments are sound, further refinement of sub-FRs for travel and dump phases is needed to complete the cycle time KPI coverage.
next_level_sub_frs: Minimize travel phase cycle time to meet target
Minimize dump phase cycle time to meet target

revise.why: To fully decompose the cycle time KPI into atomic sub-FRs for all phases enabling comprehensive DP and IM mapping.

assumptions: Cycle phases can be distinctly identified and controlled separately.
Vehicle module has sufficient control authority over load phase.
open_risks: Control conflicts between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
Safety Services intervention timing impacting cycle time.
evidence_needed: Cycle time measurement data per phase under operational conditions.
Interface performance and conflict resolution data between Vehicle and Teleoperation.
